channel.title: Comments on: American Craft Brewing Growth, Ep. 171
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Devin
item.dc:creator: Devin
item.description: Great video with some insightful observations. Hopefully all those that are getting into the scene right now will be successful and we'll still be enjoying their wonderful creations for years to come.
item.content:encoded: Great video with some insightful observations. Hopefully all those that are getting into the scene right now will be successful and we’ll still be enjoying their wonderful creations for years to come.
